case_title: YAN HAO CAI VS. SUNNY LOUIE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S, VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
